items.briefing:
The Australian Government has launched its Horizon 2 action plan, the next phase of Australia's national cyber security strategy, signalling continued investment in protecting individuals and organisations. Separately, Scamwatch is warning about food delivery scams and encouraging Australians to check the health of their online relationships — both common entry points for fraud targeting everyday people.

While overall phishing volumes have dropped globally, cyber risk continues to rise, so staying alert remains important. **Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected message from a food delivery service or an online contact asking for money or personal details, verify it directly through the official app or website before responding.

featured.title: Government launches Horizon 2 action plan for Australia’s cyber security strategy
featured.quote: Australia's government launches new cyber security strategy phase affecting national infrastructure protection.
